name: Get Asset Content
description: Retrieves the content payload of an asset by its ID. Content is always a Blob (binary data), returned as a hex string in JSON. Returns exists: false if the asset is not found. Returns truncated: true with the size if the content exceeds maxSize (default 1 MB). Use asset:get to retrieve metadata.

maxSize.description: Maximum content size in bytes (default 1000000). If exceeded, returns truncated: true with the size.

exists.description: True if the asset was found

value.description: Content as hex-encoded Blob (0x...). Present when exists is true and not truncated.

size.description: Content size in bytes (present when truncated)
